scripts.import:lore: node lore_extract/import-lore-archive.mjs && node lore_extract/extract-lore-page-attributes.mjs lore_extract/data.json lore_extract/output.json && node lore_extract/build-compendium-source.mjs lore_extract/output.json lore_extract/creature-mapping.json && fvtt package pack "creatures" --inputDirectory "lore_extract/pack-src/creatures" --outputDirectory "packs"
